name: workspace-governor
description: Audits canonical workspace layout, reports rewrite candidates, and performs backup-first verified moves.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and verify safe workspace moves
interface.longDescription: Builds machine-readable migration plans, reports stale path rewrite candidates, performs backup-first copy verification, and keeps rollback paths available when moves fail.
defaultPrompt: Audit my workspace layout and report safe move candidates.
Show stale hard-coded paths before we move anything.
Apply a verified migration plan and preserve rollback paths.
